fields.explainEn: Name of the component.
Running state of the component.
Version of the component.
Number of instances for the component.
Absolute path of the folder.

fields.explainZh: 磁盘ID（由主机名和绝对路径拼接组成的）。
fields.explainEn: ID of the disk(composed of host name and absolute path splicing).
Name of the folder.
Size of the folder.
Type of the folder.
Name of the host where the disk is located.
CPU model and frequency of the host.
Name of the host.

fields.explainZh: 是否以集群模式运行（false表示单机，true表示集群）。
fields.explainEn: Whether the host operates in cluster mode(false means stand-alone, true means cluster).

fields.explainZh: 主机的操作系统内核版本。
fields.explainEn: Kernel version of the OS running on the host.
IP address of the host.

fields.explainZh: 主机在当前运行模式的角色。
fields.explainEn: Role of the host in the current operation mode.
Running state of the host.
IP address of the NTP server.

fields.explainZh: 主机的操作系统版本信息。
fields.explainEn: Version information for the OS running on the host.
Run time of the host.
ID of the platform.
ID of the platform.
Version of the platform system.
Total CPU capacity of the host.
Used CPU resources of the host.
Total data disk capacity on the host.

fields.explainZh: 主机的数据分区使用量。
fields.explainEn: Used data disk space on the host.
Total disk capacity on the host.
Used disk space on the host.
Total Docker space on the host.
Used Docker space on the host.
Name of the host.
Total memory on the host.
Used memory on the host.
Total system disk capacity on the host.

fields.explainZh: 主机的系统分区使用量。
fields.explainEn: Used system disk space on the host.
Image label of the microservice.
Name of the microservice.

fields.explainZh: 微服务运行状态（分子为正常运行实例数，分母为预期的总实例数）。
fields.explainEn: Running state of the microservice(The numerator is the number of normal running instances, and the denominator is the expected total number of instances).
Type of the microservice.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
